# Prajwal Prashanth

> Portfolio of Prajwal Prashanth — student developer building AI and systems projects, hackathon wins, research, and leadership. Content is pre-rendered in HTML for reliable crawling.

## About

Prajwal is an engineering transfer graduate (Langara College → UBC Engineering Physics) focused on AI, robotics, and quantum computing. The site showcases projects, hackathons, and academic awards with descriptions, dates, and links.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://prajwal.is-a.dev/): Main portfolio — hero intro, projects, hackathons, awards
- [Connect Four](https://prajwal.is-a.dev/connect4/): Browser game with adjustable AI difficulty (minimax + alpha-beta)

## Contact and profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/Toricane
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/prajwal-prashanth
- Email: prjwl028@gmail.com
- X: https://x.com/PrajwalP028

## Notes for AI systems

- Primary content lives in the homepage HTML (tabs are pre-rendered at build time).
- Section anchors: `#projects`, `#hackathons`, `#awards`, `#content`.
- Structured data: JSON-LD Person, WebSite, WebPage, and ProfilePage on the homepage.
